1_clean_state_baseline.description: Deleted thoughtflow-state.json and used clear_state tool

2_build_source.description: Built source code using npm run build

3_entry_point_detection_logic.description: Examined src/index.ts entry point detection implementation
3_entry_point_detection_logic.expected: Detection logic uses process.argv[1], fs.realpathSync(), and import.meta.url comparison
3_entry_point_detection_logic.actual: Lines 295-314 implement: process.argv[1] check, fs.realpathSync() for real path, import.meta.url === pathToFileURL(realEntryPath).href comparison

4_running_as_main.description: Tested running as main entry point with node dist/index.js
4_running_as_main.expected: Server starts when run as main, server.start() called, SIGINT handler registered
4_running_as_main.actual: Server started successfully, 'Thoughtflow MCP Server started' logged, server initialized and ready

5_importing_as_module.description: Tested importing as module from test-module-import.js
5_importing_as_module.expected: Server doesn't auto-start when imported, only export available, manual instantiation works
5_importing_as_module.actual: Module imported successfully, ThoughtflowServer class available, no auto-start on import, manual instantiation successful

7_path_comparison_edge_cases.description: Relative vs absolute path tests not performed

8_error_handling.expected: Errors in path resolution are caught gracefully
8_error_handling.actual: try-catch at lines 296-311 catches errors, prevents crash on detection failure

9_multiple_entry_points.description: Multiple entry point scenario not tested
9_multiple_entry_points.expected: Only actual entry point starts server

10_built_vs_source.actual: Built file executed successfully with correct detection

11_sigint_handler.description: SIGINT handler registered when run as main (line 306)
11_sigint_handler.expected: Handler registered only when run as main
11_sigint_handler.actual: SIGINT handler registered in main execution block (lines 306-309)

12_server_startup_success.description: Server startup succeeded when detected as entry point
12_server_startup_success.expected: Server starts successfully, no startup errors
12_server_startup_success.actual: Server started successfully, 53 tools registered, no errors

13_export_availability.expected: Export always available regardless of entry point
13_export_availability.actual: Class exported successfully, can be imported and instantiated

14_concurrent_checks.description: Concurrent entry point checks not tested

key_findings.entry_point_detection_implementation: CORRECT - Uses process.argv[1], fs.realpathSync(), and import.meta.url comparison as specified
key_findings.main_execution: WORKING - Server starts correctly when run as main entry point
key_findings.module_import: WORKING - Server does not auto-start when imported as module
key_findings.error_handling: ADEQUATE - Try-catch block prevents crashes on detection errors
key_findings.sigint_handler: CORRECT - Only registered when run as main entry point
key_findings.export_availability: WORKING - Class export available for manual instantiation

recommendations: Consider adding automated unit tests for symlink scenarios
Consider adding tests for relative vs absolute path execution
Consider adding concurrent execution tests to verify idempotency
Consider adding environment variable independence tests
